title: Metro Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Metro Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!
